description:
The quiz evaluates practical PostgreSQL knowledge, testing abilities in using built‑in aggregates, type casting, constraints, and other nuanced features. It is moderately challenging, blending common tasks with obscure gotchas, and maintains an encouraging, instructional tone. The content is designed to reinforce learning while providing a fun, competitive experience.
Topics: PostgreSQL aggregates, Type casting, Constraints, Advanced SQL features, Database gotchas
Audience: Developers and database professionals with intermediate PostgreSQL experience who want to deepen their expertise.
